title: Implement work model v2: case, change, investigation
description: Implement the approved Portarium work model spec for first-class Work Item kinds (`case`, `change`, `investigation`). Preserve the existing governance backbone (Run, Plan, Approval Gate, Evidence Log), keep Project generic, and make Cockpit surfaces and execution substrates kind-aware. Source spec: docs/internal/specs/work-model-case-change-investigation.md

title: ADR: choose canonical runtime term and responsibilities
description: Write and ratify an ADR that chooses the canonical runtime term (`WorkRuntime` vs `MissionRuntime` vs `ExecutionCell`) and defines runtime responsibilities, boundaries, child resources (browser/terminal sessions), and the split between control plane and execution plane for Change-heavy work.

title: Spec and implement WorkItem.kind API contract
description: Update domain types, persistence contracts, HTTP API contracts, and validation so every Work Item has a first-class `kind` field with supported values `case`, `change`, and `investigation`. Preserve backward compatibility during migration and define server behavior when old clients omit `kind`.

title: Design kind-aware Cockpit IA and routing
description: Update Cockpit/Mission Control IA so work is segmented into Cases, Changes, and Investigations while keeping one shell, one inbox, one approvals queue, and one evidence model. Include list filters, badges, project-level segmentation, and kind-sensitive detail panes.

title: Specify and implement Change runtime lifecycle
description: Design and implement the local-first runtime lifecycle for Change work items, including runtime provisioning, terminal sessions, browser sessions, preview/dev server exposure, snapshots, failure recovery, and policy-aware routing of risky runtime actions.

title: Define Investigation outputs and conversion flows
description: Specify Investigation output schema, confidence signaling, evidence/source completeness expectations, and the conversion flows Investigation→Case and Investigation→Change. Include lineage rules so derived work preserves source evidence and relationships.

title: Migrate existing generic Work Items to kinded work items
description: Create and validate migration heuristics that classify historical generic Work Items into `case`, `change`, or `investigation` using linked object signals (e.g. repo/branch/deployment vs CRM/helpdesk/customer/invoice/email-thread). Define review handling for ambiguous items and update docs/test fixtures accordingly.

title: Update product copy and docs for the new work model
description: Update README examples, architecture explanations, UI/IA docs, onboarding language, and glossary so the product consistently explains that Portarium governs work and that each Work Item is a Case, Change, or Investigation with shared approvals, policy, runs, and evidence.
